channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fred 'Vunjabei' Ngajilo Wins CCM Primary for Isimani Parliamentary Seat
item.description: In Isimani Constituency, Iringa, the Chama Cha Mapinduzi (CCM) party has completed its primaries to select a parliamentary candidate after the seat became vacant due to the passing of former MP Willia...

item.title: PTI Raises Concerns Over Wheat Crisis and Farmer Losses in Punjab
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan Tehreek-i-Insaf (PTI) Central Information Secretary Sheikh Waqas Akram has strongly criticised the current government for its policies, which, according to him, have put the agricu...

item.title: Tshwane CFO questioned over potential conflict of interest with tender process
item.description: Suspended Tshwane City CFO Gareth Mnisi is under scrutiny at the Madlanga Commission of Inquiry over allegations of a conflict of interest. Mnisi is accused of assisting Ngaphesheya Construction and P...

item.title: UK government plans reform to reduce link between electricity prices and gas costs
item.description: The UK government is set to announce plans to weaken the link between electricity prices and volatile gas markets, aiming to shield households from sharp price rises caused by global events. Currently...

item.title: AI-Generated Music Floods Deezer Uploads While Streams Remain Minimal
item.description: Deezer reports a rapid rise in AI-generated music, stating that 44% of all tracks uploaded to its platform each day are now created using artificial intelligence. This equates to roughly 75,000 AI-gen...

item.title: African Countries Named After Historical Figures
item.description: Some African countries get their names from people wey don pass away, wey e show say history dey very important for how nations dey define themselves. Eswatini, formerly Swaziland, carry name of King ...

item.title: Green Party targets younger voters with nightclub events ahead of local elections
item.description: The Green Party, led by Zack Polanski, is experimenting with unconventional campaigning methods by hosting nightclub events aimed at engaging younger and less politically active audiences ahead of the...

item.title: Call for Marcos to uphold Philippine sovereignty in West Philippine Sea energy decisions
item.description: The article argues that President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. should take a principled stand on the issue of joint oil and gas exploration with China in the West Philippine Sea, particularly in Reed Bank. It...

item.title: High Court rejects Mitch Winehouse claim over auctioned belongings of Amy Winehouse
item.description: Mitch Winehouse, the father of the late singer Amy Winehouse, has lost a High Court case concerning dozens of his daughter’s personal belongings that were sold at auction in the United States. He had ...

item.title: South C Residents Protest Over Unsafe Building Collapse, Call for Accountability
item.description: Residents of South C in Nairobi staged peaceful protests on April 20, 2026, demanding government intervention after a 16-storey building on Muhoho Avenue collapsed earlier in January, killing two peop...

item.title: Airdrie woman warns of job scam after applying through reputable-looking website
item.description: A retired interior designer from Airdrie, Alberta, is raising concerns after she unknowingly applied for what turned out to be a fraudulent job posting that appeared on a legitimate-looking job search...

item.title: King Charles commemorates Queen Elizabeth II’s 100th birth anniversary with tribute and national events
item.description: Nagbigay si King Charles III ng isang taos-pusong tribute sa kanyang ina na si Queen Elizabeth II sa araw na sana ay ika-100 kaarawan nito noong Abril 21, 2026. Sa isang televised message, inilarawan ...

item.title: Segments of MAGA Movement Express Doubts About 2024 Trump Assassination Attempt
item.description: A CNN report highlights emerging skepticism within parts of the MAGA movement regarding the 2024 assassination attempt on former President Donald Trump in Butler, Pennsylvania. According to the segmen...

item.title: Shelter-in-Place Issued for Old Fort Slide Area in British Columbia
item.description: Residents near the Old Fort slide in British Columbia have been instructed to shelter in place due to concerns about cracking and the potential for further movement. Authorities issued the order as a ...

item.title: ANC to refer Ramokgopa to integrity commission over ANC Women’s League vehicle allegations
item.description: ANC secretary-general Fikile Mbalula has adopted a firmer stance on allegations surrounding luxury vehicles linked to the ANC Women’s League (ANCWL), confirming that minister in the Presidency Maropen...

item.title: Reports of political pressure and internal tensions surrounding Whoopi Goldberg’s future on The View
item.description: Whoopi Goldberg’s long-standing role as moderator of the US daytime talk show The View has come under renewed scrutiny amid rumours of backstage tensions and political pressure. Goldberg, who has led ...

item.title: Supreme Court Rejects Umar Khalid Review Plea, Seeks Report on West Bengal Voter Tribunal Functioning
item.description: The Supreme Court has dismissed a review petition filed by activist Umar Khalid, who had challenged its earlier decision denying him bail in the Delhi riots conspiracy case. The court stated that it f...

item.title: Why addressing issues early prevents bigger conflicts
item.description: The article explains how many people often notice problems early in different areas of life, but choose not to act on them until the situation becomes worse and harder to manage. According to Haika Ge...

item.title: ACT police release images of Higgins pharmacy armed robbery suspect
item.description: More than 50 days after an armed robbery at the Advantage Chemist in Higgins, ACT Policing is continuing its investigation to apprehend the suspect. The man reportedly entered the pharmacy around 11:1...

item.title: Schoolchildren in Western Kenya Lead Fight Against Rising Malaria Threat Amid Climate and Funding Challenges
item.description: In western Kenya’s Kisumu County, malaria remains a serious and persistent health threat, especially for children living near Lake Victoria where conditions favour mosquito breeding. At St. Anne’s Ahe...
